user.title: HA Blinds Setup
user.description:
Choose entities and window orientation.

This automation will control your blinds based on sun position, brightness (lux), and temperature.

data_description.window_azimuth: The azimuth of the window in degrees (e.g., 180 for South, 270 for West). Best value: Use a compass app while facing out of the window.
data_description.window_view_left: Angle of view to the left from the center of the window (0-180). E.g., 90 means an unobstructed view to the left.
data_description.window_view_right: Angle of view to the right from the center of the window (0-180). E.g., 90 means an unobstructed view to the right.

options.title: HA Blinds Tuning
options.description: Set thresholds, debounce, and movement profile. Changes take effect immediately.

data_description.lux_close_summer: Lux threshold to close blinds in summer. Higher = close only in bright sun. Recommended: 35000.
data_description.lux_open_summer: Lux threshold to open blinds in summer. Should be lower than close lux. Recommended: 20000.
data_description.lux_close_winter: Lux threshold to close blinds in winter. Winter sun is lower, might be lower than summer. Recommended: 20000.
data_description.lux_open_winter: Lux threshold to open blinds in winter. Recommended: 12000.
data_description.debounce_minutes: Minutes to wait before reacting to lux changes to prevent flapping. Recommended: 5-10.
data_description.tick_minutes: Frequency of checking/updating blind position in minutes. Recommended: 5.
data_description.max_step_per_tick: Max position change per tick to make movement smoother. Recommended: 10.
data_description.heat_start_hour: Hour to start heat protection mode (0-23). Recommended: 10.
data_description.heat_end_hour: Hour to end heat protection mode (0-23). Recommended: 17.
data_description.heat_position: Blind position during heat protection (0-100). Recommended: 20.
data_description.temp_threshold: Temperature above which heat protection activates if an indoor temp sensor is provided. Recommended: 24.0.
data_description.winter_privacy_hour: Hour to close blinds for privacy in winter (0-23). Recommended: 16.
data_description.summer_privacy_hour: Hour to close blinds for privacy in summer (0-23). Recommended: 19.
data_description.manual_override_minutes: How long to disable auto-control after manual intervention. Recommended: 45.

init.title: HA Blinds Options
init.description: Adjust thresholds and timing without re-adding integration. All changes take effect immediately.

data_description.lux_close_summer: Lux threshold to close blinds in summer. Higher = close only in bright sun. Recommended: 35000.
data_description.lux_open_summer: Lux threshold to open blinds in summer. Should be lower than close lux. Recommended: 20000.
data_description.lux_close_winter: Lux threshold to close blinds in winter. Winter sun is lower, might be lower than summer. Recommended: 20000.
data_description.lux_open_winter: Lux threshold to open blinds in winter. Recommended: 12000.
data_description.debounce_minutes: Minutes to wait before reacting to lux changes to prevent flapping. Recommended: 5-10.
data_description.tick_minutes: Frequency of checking/updating blind position in minutes. Recommended: 5.
data_description.max_step_per_tick: Max position change per tick to make movement smoother. Recommended: 10.
data_description.heat_start_hour: Hour to start heat protection mode (0-23). Recommended: 10.
data_description.heat_end_hour: Hour to end heat protection mode (0-23). Recommended: 17.
data_description.heat_position: Blind position during heat protection (0-100). Recommended: 20.
data_description.temp_threshold: Temperature above which heat protection activates if an indoor temp sensor is provided. Recommended: 24.0.
data_description.winter_privacy_hour: Hour to close blinds for privacy in winter (0-23). Recommended: 16.
data_description.summer_privacy_hour: Hour to close blinds for privacy in summer (0-23). Recommended: 19.
data_description.manual_override_minutes: How long to disable auto-control after manual intervention. Recommended: 45.

pause.name: Pause Automation
pause.description: Pause one or all HA Blinds entries for a period.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional config entry ID. If omitted, applies to all entries.

resume.name: Resume Automation
resume.description: Resume one or all HA Blinds entries immediately.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional config entry ID. If omitted, applies to all entries.

evaluate_now.name: Evaluate Now
evaluate_now.description: Trigger immediate evaluation for one or all HA Blinds entries.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional config entry ID. If omitted, applies to all entries.
